queries.question: Show all of the press conferences and then just the interviews with politicians.
queries.sql:
SELECT Press_Conferences.Title
FROM Press_Conferences
UNION
SELECT Interviews.Title
FROM Interviews
WHERE Interviews.Participant_Type = "Politician"

queries.question: Show all the press conferences and interviews where a politician was participating.
queries.sql:
SELECT Press_Conferences.Title
FROM Press_Conferences
WHERE Press_Conferences.Participant_Type = "Politician"
UNION
SELECT Interviews.Title
FROM Interviews
WHERE Interviews.Participant_Type = "Politician"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show all the press conferences and interviews where a politician was participating.
